dct_description_sm: The NZMS260 is a historical 1:50,000 topographical series published by Toitū Te Whenua / Land Information New Zealand. The NZMS 260 Topographic map series began in 1977 and ended production in 2009. It has been replaced the NZTopo50 series.
dct_creator_sm: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand
dct_publisher_sm: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand
